whatThisIs: Search the CMS MS-DRG (Medicare Severity Diagnosis Related Group) table - the inpatient hospital classification system that drives prospective payment under IPPS. Each DRG carries a title, the Major Diagnostic Category (MDC) it rolls up to, the CMS relative weight that scales the base payment rate, and the geometric and arithmetic mean lengths of stay (GMLOS and AMLOS). Sophie Well's table loads the active FY DRG set; filter by code or by any word in the title.
whenToUse: Use this when reviewing an inpatient claim or hospital bill to understand the payment grouping the encounter rolls up to, when comparing an outlier length of stay against the GMLOS that drives transfer-rule and outlier payments, or when teaching residents and coders how CC/MCC severity tiers move an admission between paired DRGs (e.g., 291 / 292 / 293 for heart failure). The relative weight column is the fastest way to estimate the order-of-magnitude IPPS payment for an admission.
